title: ExperienceBundleSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents the org setting that enables the ExperienceBundle metadata type for Aura sites in Experience Cloud. The setting doesn’t affect LWR sites, which use ExperienceBundle by default. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

enableExperienceBundleMetadata.description: Indicates whether the ExperienceBundle metadata type is enabled for Aura sites. Default is false. LWR sites use ExperienceBundle by default.
